source_claim: Ju, Gao, Jiang, Wu, Sun, Chen, Wang, Wang, Wang, He, Wu, Xiao, Liu, Dai, Dong (2026) demonstrated the Rethlas+Archon pipeline resolving a commutative-algebra open problem with a Lean 4 proof (arXiv:2604.03789).
qa_translation: Reproduction of the paper's result inside QA requires a Lean 4 backend (formal/lean/ tree) that does not yet exist in this repo. The conjecture is recorded as an architectural placeholder: the QA cert system can describe the resolution event (generators, witness, verdict) but cannot independently re-verify the Lean proof.
failure_mode: No Lean 4 backend is wired into this repo; the paper's Lean proof has not been reproduced inside QA. Cert records the paper's result with machine-checkable metadata but defers proof-closure to the original Lean artifacts.
open_questions: Lean 4 bridge scope in QA — see docs/theory/QA_AUTOMATED_CONJECTURE_RESOLUTION.md §7 Q1
Retroactive application to existing cert families — §7 Q3
source_attribution: Will Dale + Claude 2026-04-15; placeholder for arXiv:2604.03789 bridge; see docs/theory/QA_AUTOMATED_CONJECTURE_RESOLUTION.md
